indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and comfortable, providing ample space for rest.

indicators.name: pillows
indicators.rationale: The pillows are soft and supportive, enhancing comfort during sleep.

indicators.name: dark lighting
indicators.rationale: The dark lighting helps to create a calming atmosphere conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: minimalist decor
indicators.rationale: The minimalist decor reduces distractions and promotes relaxation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is well-suited for sleep (primary) due to its comfortable bed, supportive pillows, calming lighting, and minimalistic decor.
